title: Garn47 Music Discs
description: Adds over 100 craftable music discs based on the Garn47 OST! (I do not own any of the music added by this mod)
body:
## The Mod
**This mod adds over 120 unique (and craftable) music discs based on the Garn47 OST, so you can listen to all of the game's songs from within your Minecraft world!**

Before you can start your music disc collection, you'll first need to craft some Disc Cores. These are necessary for crafting almost all of the discs in the mod!

![Disc Core Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c179714f0dc13e1a174140c97ec8d310c4ed20f.png)

Expect this mod to update when new tracks are added to the OST. I might also update it to add some extra features like advancements or loot tables.

This is my first Minecraft mod, made with MCreator because i am terrible at coding in general lol. (Also i have no idea if this mod actually works with versions above 1.21.8 i haven't tested that.)

## Credits
**_I do not own ANY of the music featured in this mod_, i only made the disc sprites. All credit goes to the original composers:**
- [Floombo](https://www.youtube.com/@Floombo)
- [Ironik](https://www.youtube.com/@Ironik0422)
- [Finle¥ Rendon](https://www.youtube.com/@FinleyRendon)
- [PHO](https://www.youtube.com/@pho5075)
- [scrumbo_](https://www.youtube.com/@scrumbo_2096)
- [RedTv53](https://www.youtube.com/@RedTv53)
- [raxdflipnote](https://www.youtube.com/@raxdflipnote) (honorably mentioned)
- [JoeyAnimations](https://www.youtube.com/@joeyanimations)

Additionally, all songs can be found in [this playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlhURN5clIi5RsDEEqDb3zjvl7xDT61jq).

Garn47 created by Floombo. I have no affiliation with the game's development, and I will not hesitate to take this mod down if requested to.
